# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: TrafficPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-policy
  namespace: linkerd-example
spec:
  destinations:
    - kind: Service
      name: my-service
      namespace: default
      ports:
        - port: 8080
          protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: authorization-policy
  namespace: linkerd-example
spec:
  action: Allow
  destinations:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: my-service-account
      namespace: default

---
apiVersion: meta.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector-binding
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: linkerd-proxy-injector-sa
    namespace: linkerd

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: my-service-account
      containers:
        - name: my-service-container
          image: my-service-image
